subject: Math

lesson.story_mission: Join the Operations Trail team to solve two-step word problems using all four operations.
lesson.mini_lesson: Solve two-step word problems using all four operations.
lesson.objective: Solve two-step word problems using all four operations.
lesson.concept_explanation: Solve two-step word problems using all four operations. Use models, equations, and careful checking to explain each answer.
lesson.common_misconception: Learners may choose an operation too quickly or miss how the model connects to the equation.
lesson.real_world_connection: These skills help solve classroom supplies, games, snacks, teams, and sharing situations.
lesson.lesson_summary: Read the situation, build the model, write the equation, solve, and check with an inverse or another strategy.
hints: Read the problem and name what is known.
Use the model to connect numbers to an equation.
Check that the answer matches the question asked.

misconception_bank.operation_selection_error: Learner may choose an operation that does not match the story action.
misconception_bank.two_step_tracking_error: Learner may solve only one step or lose the intermediate result.
misconception_bank.hidden_question_confusion: Learner may miss the question that must be answered first.
misconception_bank.equation_setup_error: Learner may write numbers in an equation that does not match the story.

game_theme.title: Two-Step Word Problems
game_theme.mission_intro: Complete the Operations Trail by proving you can solve two-step word problems using all four operations.
